project_type: Rust + Flutter desktop/mobile app (RustDesk remote desktop)
build_system: cargo + flutter + python build.py; GitHub Actions CI/CD
test_framework: N/A for this task (workflow YAML files only)
build_command: N/A (workflow files are validated by GitHub Actions itself)
test_command: yamllint or actionlint for workflow validation (best-effort)
verification_instructions: Validate YAML syntax of new/modified workflow files. Check that workflow references are consistent.
setup_instructions: Repository is already cloned. No additional setup needed for workflow file changes.
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode. Cannot run actual GitHub Actions workflows locally. Validation is limited to YAML syntax and logical correctness.
contribution_requirements: Change only what is required. Prefer the smallest valid diff. Keep naming/style consistent with nearby code.
key_patterns: Workflows use reusable workflow pattern (workflow_call). flutter-build.yml is the main build workflow accepting upload-artifact (bool) and upload-tag (string) inputs. Releases use softprops/action-gh-release@v1 with prerelease: true. Nightly build uses tag 'nightly'. flutter-nightly.yml triggers flutter-build.yml via 'uses: ./.github/workflows/flutter-build.yml'.
directory_structure: .github/workflows/ contains all CI/CD workflows. flutter-build.yml is the comprehensive build workflow called by flutter-nightly.yml and flutter-tag.yml.
